title: Weight Scale Form
description: Record weight and body composition metrics in Garmin FIT format. The form accepts weight as a required field and multiple optional body composition, metabolic, and rating metrics.

weight.title: Weight
weight.description: Body weight in kilograms. Required field.

bmi.title: Body Mass Index
bmi.description: Body mass index calculated as weight (kg) / height² (m²)

percentFat.title: Body Fat Percentage
percentFat.description: Percentage of body weight that is fat tissue

percentHydration.title: Hydration Percentage
percentHydration.description: Percentage of body weight that is water

visceralFatMass.title: Visceral Fat Mass
visceralFatMass.description: Mass of visceral fat (fat around organs) in kilograms

basalMet.title: Basal Metabolic Rate
basalMet.description: Energy expenditure at rest in kilocalories per day

activeMet.title: Active Metabolic Rate
activeMet.description: Energy expenditure with activity in kilocalories per day

metabolicAge.title: Metabolic Age
metabolicAge.description: Biological age estimate based on metabolic rate in years

physiqueRating.title: Physique Rating
physiqueRating.description: Body composition rating from 1 (Hidden Obese) to 9 (Very Muscular), based on body fat to muscle mass ratio

visceralFatRating.title: Visceral Fat Rating
visceralFatRating.description: Visceral fat level from 1 to 59. Healthy/standard: 1-12, High/excess: 13-59
